text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 113 

GAP_LTCP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES:
